headline: Ulta Beauty Uber Eats Deal Tests Omnichannel Growth And Profitability Potential
summary: Ulta Beauty, NasdaqGS:ULTA, has launched a nationwide delivery partnership with Uber Eats. More than 1,500 Ulta stores are joining the Uber Eats marketplace, giving customers access to beauty and wellness products for on demand delivery across the U.S. This move expands Ulta Beauty's omnichannel reach and responds to growing demand for fast, app based shopping. For investors watching NasdaqGS:ULTA, this partnership comes at a time when the stock trades at $526.53 and has returned 35.6% over...
